Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Omnio by Digitivia.

What channels does the AI agent support?+
Omnio by Digitivia supports WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Instagram DMs, Telegram, and a website chat widget. All conversations appear in a unified inbox so you never miss a message.
How does the AI agent learn about my business?+
You configure each agent with a system prompt that defines its personality, knowledge, and behavior. You can also add reference links and upload documents to the Knowledge Base so the agent gives accurate, business-specific answers.
Can I take over a conversation from the AI?+
Yes. The AI Inbox has an AI/Human mode toggle. When you switch to Human mode, the AI pauses and you can respond directly. Switch back to AI mode anytime and the agent resumes.
What e-commerce platforms do you integrate with?+
We currently integrate with Shopify (via Storefront API), WooCommerce (via REST API), and Easy Orders. Your product catalog syncs automatically, and you can manage orders and send WhatsApp confirmations.
How does pricing work?+
We offer three plans — Starter, Growth, and Pro — with monthly or yearly billing (20% discount on yearly). Prices are shown in your local currency. All plans include the full platform; higher tiers unlock more conversations, advanced features, and priority support. Enterprise organizations can contact sales for a custom plan.
How do you handle data privacy?+
We are fully GDPR compliant. You can download or delete your data at any time. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We maintain audit logs and strict access controls.
Can my team use it together?+
Yes. You can invite team members and assign roles (Owner, Manager, Member) with granular permissions. Task assignment, lead assignment, and audit logging are built in.
How long does setup take?+
Most businesses are up and running in under 15 minutes. A guided setup wizard walks you through connecting your channels, configuring your agent, and adding your knowledge base. We also offer 2 free consultation sessions.

Documentation & User Guide

🚀 Getting Started

Welcome to Omnio by Digitivia! This platform allows you to create, manage, and monitor powerful AI agents across multiple communication channels.

🤖 Agent Roles & System Prompts

The System Prompt is the brain of your agent. It defines who the agent is, what it knows, and how it speaks.

  • Role: Define the persona (e.g., Support Agent, Sales Rep).
  • Tone: Adjectives that describe the personality (e.g., Professional, Friendly, Helpful).
  • Knowledge Base Links: Add URLs that your agent should use as a reference to answer questions accurately.
Pro Tip: Be specific in your System Prompt. Instead of "You are a helpful assistant," try "You are an expert real estate consultant for Acme Realty, specializing in downtown apartments."

🔌 Connecting Channels

To start receiving messages, you need to connect your social channels:

  • Go to the specific agent tab in the left sidebar.
  • Click the "Connect Channel" button.
  • Follow the integration steps (currently requires a consultation for setup).

📨 Using AI Inbox & Sales Leads

  • AI Inbox: Monitor real-time conversations between your agents and consumers.
  • Sales Leads: Automatically captures contact details and interests from conversations.
  • Live Insights: View performance metrics, message volume, and engagement statistics.

If you're stuck or need a custom implementation, our team is here to help.
